headline: Assessing Aptiv (APTV) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent share performance context Aptiv (APTV) has recently drawn attention after a period in which the stock declined 16% over the past month and 29% over the past 3 months, inviting closer scrutiny from investors. See our latest analysis for Aptiv. At a share price of US$59.07, Aptiv’s recent 16% 1 month share price decline and 29% 3 month share price decline sit against a 12 month total shareholder return of 37%. This suggests that shorter term momentum has faded while longer term holders...
